text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Mayano said I'm still a stupid kid 'cause I<n>don't
know anything about love!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But that's not true! I know a thing or two<n>about it,
I swear!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I mean, your chest gets all tight and your<n>heart
goes crazy, right? That's just like<n>what happens
when I watch a super<n>amazing race!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey! What're you laughing at?! If I'm<n>wrong, just
tell me!
